return(function(D,W,F,z,a,G,U,j,y,w,O,L,s,p,S,m,E,I,k,c,Q,n,H)H,k,S,O,w,c,j,I,m,n,E,Q,p,y,L,s=function(D,q)local W=E(q)local F=function(F,z,a,G,U)return m(D,{F;z,a;G;U},q,W)end return F end,function(D,q)local W=E(q)local F=function(F)return m(D,{F},q,W)end return F end,function(D)local q,m=408454-408453,D[179283-179282]while m do
